svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="User Flow" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="-599" dy="-166" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1220" pageHeight="640" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="uf_note" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontSize=12;fontStyle=2;" value="Screen journey — same on all platforms; UI differs (shadcn web/desktop vs RN mobile)." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="700" x="40" y="16" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Landing" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Landing
(web only)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="66" width="230" x="60" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Auth" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Sign in / Sign up
+ Google OAuth" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="66" width="230" x="60" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Onb" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="Onboarding
goal, units, tz, notif permission" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="66" width="230" x="60" y="370" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Dash" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Dashboard (home)
ring, quick-add, recent" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="66" width="230" x="470" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Hist" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="History
7/30-day, streak" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="66" width="230" x="880" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Rem" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Reminders
mode, window, quiet -> re-arm" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="66" width="230" x="880" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Set" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Settings
profile, units, tz, devices" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="66" width="230" x="880" y="370" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="u1" edge="1" parent="1" source="Landing" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="Auth" value="Get started"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="u2" edge="1" parent="1" source="Auth" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;exitX=0.3;exitY=1;entryX=0.3;entryY=0;" target="Onb" value="new user"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="u3" edge="1" parent="1" source="Auth" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;" target="Dash" value="returning"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="u4" edge="1" parent="1" source="Onb" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0.25;entryY=1;" target="Dash" value="finish setup"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="400" y="403" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="u5" edge="1" parent="1" source="Dash" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;exitX=1;exitY=0.25;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;" target="Hist" value="nav"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="u6" edge="1" parent="1" source="Dash" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;" target="Rem" value="nav"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="u7" edge="1" parent="1" source="Dash" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;exitX=1;exitY=0.75;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;" target="Set" value="nav"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="u8" edge="1" parent="1" source="Set" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;" target="Auth" value="sign out"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="995" y="560" /> <mxPoint x="175" y="560" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="u9" edge="1" parent="1" source="Dash" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;exitX=0.7;exitY=0;entryX=0.3;entryY=0;" target="Dash" value="log water (+ undo)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="620" y="175" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 7px; margin-left: 2px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-style: italic; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: Screen journey — same on all platforms; UI differs (shadcn web/desktop vs RN mobile).
